name: Sign In
purpose: Email/password login form. Issues access and refresh tokens on success, applies user theme preference, and handles cross-origin redirects to the reports app.
actions: Log in with email and password

name: Sign Up
purpose: New-user registration form. Collects name, email, phone, and password; validates reCAPTCHA; creates a PENDING account and sends an email-verification link.

name: Verification Pending
purpose: Holding page shown after signup while the user's email is unverified. Lets the user resend the verification email (rate-limited) or update their email address before verifying.

name: Email Verification
purpose: Consumes the CONFIRM_EMAIL JWT from the email link, activates the account (PENDING → ACTIVE), and auto-assigns the user to a matching company if the email domain matches.
actions: Auto-verify on page load via URL token

name: Forgot Password
purpose: Accepts an email address and sends a password-reset link. Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

name: Reset Password
purpose: Consumes the RESET_PASSWORD JWT from the email link and sets a new password. Requires password confirmation.
actions: Set new password via email token

name: Portfolio Map
purpose: Displays all company sites on an interactive Google Map with color-coded markers, alongside status summary tables and alarm summaries. Entry point to the fleet overview.
actions: Filter map by status or alarm

name: Portfolio Status
purpose: Detailed table view of all sites with service status, connection status, event counts, and setup progress. Supports search, filtering, and site-note editing. Auto-refreshes every minute.

name: Energy KPIs
purpose: Analytics sub-page showing fleet-wide energy performance charts and key performance indicators.

name: Triage
purpose: Analytics sub-page showing fault monitoring, alert severity, and triage-focused diagnostics for the fleet.

name: Irradiation
purpose: Analytics sub-page showing irradiance and solar resource analytics for the fleet.

name: Site Overview
purpose: KPI dashboard showing real-time energy metrics, status badges, site location map, and site plan for one installation.

name: Site Live View
purpose: Real-time channel data and live readings from the site's connected devices.

name: Site Setup Tracker
purpose: Commissioning checklist showing setup step progress, completion status, and responsibility assignments.

name: General Info
purpose: Editable site metadata including name, location, capacity, contacts, subscription details, and energy model configuration.

name: Hardware / Services
purpose: Hardware inventory, asset records, and service history for the site.

name: Energy Model
purpose: Predicted and learned energy model data, monthly power forecasts, and capacity test analysis.

name: Virtual Site Builder
purpose: Drag-and-drop visual builder (React Flow) for mapping a site's device topology, assigning channels to nodes, and deploying that mapping onto channel.siteMap (Admin/SuperAdmin only).

name: Channels
purpose: Configuration and status of all data channels including DENO, gateway, modem, Modbus, and OPC servers.

name: Denobox
purpose: Virtual file browser for the site's S3-backed Denobox storage. Supports upload, download, drag-and-drop moves, note annotations, full-text search (including S3 metadata), and delete with automatic event logging. HEIC images are converted to WebP in-browser before upload.
actions: Search files by name or note

name: Capacity Test
purpose: 3-step wizard (Check Data -> Input Test Conditions -> Review Report) that runs an ASTM/IEC capacity test for one site against the external Matrix Python service and auto-downloads the generated report.
actions: Set TRC, filters, soiling, shade, test method

name: Channel Map
purpose: Visual layout map showing physical channel positions and relationships on the site.

name: Learned Shade Profile
purpose: Shade profile learned from historical irradiance data, showing seasonal shading patterns.

name: Benchmark Alignment
purpose: Tool to align energy model benchmarks against measured data and optimize performance predictions.

name: Energy Accounting
purpose: Detailed energy accounting and disaggregation analytics dashboard for the site.

name: Notifications
purpose: Per-site alarm notification rules: each rule maps an AlarmConfig to delivery channels (EMAIL_SITE_MANAGERS, APP, DAILY_REPORT), explicit email addresses, and a delivery delay (IMMEDIATE, TWO_HOURS, NEXT_DAY). Only visible to Super Admins or sites on the Enterprise subscription plan.

name: Site Status
purpose: Per-site status. SiteStatusView polls GET_CHANNELS (60s) and renders an optional gateway remote-management table plus an ACTIVE-channel table with key metric, lastReportedAt, binary Data Service Status (channel connectionStatus), open/30-day alarm counts, and notes. connectionStatus is a stored field; alarm counts are computed server-side via event lookups.

name: Portfolio Status
purpose: Fleet-wide status table. PortfolioStatusView polls GET_SITES (60s, showNotes:true) and renders one row per company-scoped site: 3-state connection dot (stored connectionStatus, green/yellow/red), service status, lastReportedAt, 7d EPI (kpi.week.epi, color-tiered), critical-alarm and flagged-task counts (computed via event lookups), customer/Denowatts setup status, and notes. Rows link to Site Status, Analytics, Events Feed, and the setup tracker.
actions: Drill into Site Status / Analytics / Events

name: Channel Status
purpose: Detailed status view for one selected channel. ChannelMetricsTable polls getChannelMetrics (60s) to show the latest per-metric values from the channelraws time-series collection, plus info cards (Channel ID, Source, Status, Last Reported from lastConnectedAt). Channel/site selection and ?site=&channel= URL sync live in ChannelSettings.

name: Company
purpose: Own-company profile page. Loads the current user's company (GET_COMAPANY by currentUser.company), lets them view/edit company info, and lists users assigned to the company with roles/status. Non-SuperAdmin edits are reduced to siteTags only by CompaniesService.update.

name: Services
purpose: Service management page for configuring service contracts, SLAs, and support terms associated with the company.

name: Quotation Management
purpose: Paginated list of all quotes with summary stats (total count, total amount, average amount). Default filter excludes WITHDRAWN and DELETED. Supports server-side search, status filter, and sort by AC nameplate, ship date, create date, or expiry. SUPER_ADMIN can export to XLSX and delete quotes.
actions: Search by site name / requestor / company / reference ID

name: Create Quote
purpose: 5-step wizard for creating a single quote: (1) Project - owner and site, (2) Location - address, (3) Details - mounting/module/data acquisition, (4) Services - tier/term/options with live QuickBooks product pricing, (5) Review - editable product table with quantities and discounts.

name: Edit Quote
purpose: Edit an existing quote using the same 5-step wizard. Pre-populates all fields from the stored quote. For group (renewal) quotes, navigates to the renewal edit page instead.

name: Quote Document View
purpose: Rendered quote document showing cover page, introduction, product table, and terms. For signed quotes, shows DocuSeal signing URL. ADMIN/USER can initiate the DocuSeal signing workflow from here.
actions: View group quote child sites table

name: Bulk Create Quotes
purpose: Upload an XLSX file to bulk-create multiple quotes in one operation. Products are auto-calculated per site configuration (no manual product list required). All quotes share the same owner. Fails entirely if any row is invalid.

name: Quote Order
purpose: Order form for a signed quote. Collects billing and shipping contact info, confirmed ship date, and order documents. On submit, creates a QuickBooks invoice and transitions the quote to ORDERED status. Sends order confirmation email to quote owner and QB customer.

name: Renew Quote
purpose: Create a new renewal group quote for one or more existing sites. Pre-populates products based on installed Deno sensor types and current subscription plan. Creates a group parent quote plus one child quote per site.

name: Edit Renewal Quote
purpose: Edit an existing renewal group quote. Upserts child quotes per site, recalculates group totals from all children. Sends update notification email.

name: Notification Management
purpose: Company-wide notification settings table (11 rows: 3 alarm severities + 8 event categories). For each row, configure whether in-app and email notifications are enabled, which site managers and additional users receive them, and whether the rule is active. Super Admins can select any company; other users see their own company. Changes are persisted to Company.notificationSettings via updateCompany mutation.
actions: Add other specific users as recipients

name: Global Alarm Configuration
purpose: System-wide alarm rule definitions (AlarmConfig records) applied to every site. Each rule defines a target (site metric / channel metric / channel status), an effect, a severity (CRITICAL/HIGH/ROUTINE), channel prefixes, a metric, an operator (>, <, =) plus threshold, a suppression level, optional delay/condition, and a notifySupport flag. Editing (create/update/delete/reorder/bulk-save) is Super Admin only; other users see a read-only view. Rules are consumed downstream by the alarm-event pipeline and webhook notifications.
actions: Edit alarm fields (target, effect, severity, metric, operator, threshold, suppression, delay, condition, notify support)

name: Metrics
purpose: Standalone read-only metric library listing every global metric definition (name, display name, unit, tags, channel prefixes, KPI flag/expression) via the public `metrics` GraphQL query. Accessible to all authenticated users regardless of company.

name: Device Types
purpose: Read-only reference catalog of channel/signal device types as a Category -> Major -> Minor taxonomy keyed by a unique dotted 'prefix', each with an optional key metric. Renders all rows from the public deviceTypes GraphQL query in a merged-row table; the same data is reused for Modbus channel classification, Site Builder matching, metrics, and alarm config. No create/edit/delete.
actions: View device type taxonomy table (Category, Major, Minor, Prefix, Key Metric)
Search/filter rows client-side by category, major, minor, or prefix

name: Company Management
purpose: SuperAdmin-only page (renders Access Denied otherwise) for managing all companies as the multi-tenant boundary. Server-side paginated/searchable list (companiesWithPaginate), create/edit companies, and generate/revoke the per-company data-out API key (updateApiKey GENERATE/REVOKE).

name: Users Management
purpose: SuperAdmin-only page (ProtectedRoute redirects others to /not-found) listing all registered users across all companies. Renders an Ant Design table from GET_USERS with inline-editable Company, Role (type), and Status dropdowns that fire the updateUser mutation immediately on change. Client-side debounced search/filter across name, email, phone, company, role, status, last-active, and registered date. Status options exclude PENDING; there is no working create-user UI (the CreateUserModal is a dead stub).
actions: Change a user's status, e.g. soft-delete (updateUser)
Search and filter users by column

name: Template Management
purpose: SuperAdmin bulk editor for Modbus register-mapping templates (component dir modbus-template). Loads all templates (GET_MODBUS_TEMPLATES), stages row edits, and commits via BULK_UPDATE_MODBUS_TEMPLATES (refetches templates + channels). Warns on navigation with unsaved staged changes (useBlocker).

name: Module Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing PV module specifications including power rating, efficiency, temperature coefficient, and manufacturer details.

name: Inverter Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing inverter device specifications including power rating, input voltage, topology, and operating parameters.

name: Asset Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing the physical hardware inventory across five device types (Deno, Radio, Aux Pyranometer, Gateway, Modem). Supports paginated browsing, free-text search, create/edit operations with type-specific forms, calibration tracking, soft-delete, and per-type flag (GOOD/WATCH/REPLACE/REPLACE_URGENT/MAINTENANCE_REQUIRED/RETIRED).
actions: View assets by type (tabbed: Deno, Radio, Aux Pyranometer, Gateway, Modem)
Edit asset (type-specific edit form in modal)
Track calibration certificates with date and S3 download link
Soft-delete asset (sets deletedAt via updateAsset mutation)

name: Remote Management
purpose: SuperAdmin page for reading and writing live firmware configuration on Deno sensor devices via the Python Matrix proxy service. Supports reading full config, writing config, fetching array/block data, fetching calibration data, and issuing reset/launch commands to individual Deno units identified by serial number.
actions: Select Deno asset by serial number
Reset and read Deno in one operation (getDenoConfigResetAndReadData)

name: Metrics Management
purpose: SuperAdmin CRUD admin for the canonical metric library (the `metrics` collection). Server-side paginated/searchable/tag-filtered table (metricsWithPaginate) for creating and editing metric definitions (name, display name, unit, channel prefixes, tags, KPI flag + expression), and managing per-company name translations (companymetrics).

name: System Notification
purpose: Super Admin page to manage the singleton system-wide banner notification. The banner appears as a modal on every user's next login when status is ON. Only one system notification record can exist; creating when one exists is a no-op. Updating advances updatedAt, causing the modal to re-appear for all users.

name: Cell Modem Plan Management
purpose: SuperAdmin Lattigo cellular-usage analytics dashboard. Server-side paginated per-site data-usage table (GET_LATTIGO_USAGE_ANALYTICS with page/pageSize and optional startDate/endDate); columns and a 'Days With Data' column adapt to whether a date range is applied. Per-modem suspend/restore lives on the Channels accordion card, not here.

name: Site Launch
purpose: SuperAdmin page for managing site go-live configuration and commissioning checklist status across the fleet.

name: Activity Logs
purpose: SuperAdmin-only, append-only audit trail of every create/update/delete recorded automatically via a global Mongoose plugin. Shows timestamp, acting user (or 'System'), action type, affected collection and document id, and a JSON diff (payload/before/changes) in a detail drawer.
actions: Search by document id or user (id, name, email) or site/channel/asset/company metadata

name: API Management
purpose: SuperAdmin per-company API-key and IP-whitelist admin. Table of companies (GET_COMPANIES); per row, Generate/Revoke the company's public data-out API key (UPDATE_API_KEY with Generate/Revoke) and remove whitelisted IPs (UPDATE_COMAPNY, IP validity checked by isValidIP). ORPHANED ROUTE: ProtectedRoute-gated but has no settings-menu entry and is linked from nowhere except the router; reachable only by direct URL. Likely superseded by the API-key controls in Company Management / Company. Flag for human review.
actions: View companies and their API keys

name: Analytics Dashboard
purpose: Interactive time-series charting at channel/site/portfolio levels. Two render engines gated by enableBetaCharts (default ON): the current Plotly/Dash app embedded via dash-embedded-component (VITE_PLOTLY_URL), and a legacy Highcharts path fed by RTK Query (VITE_CHART_URL). Channel zone metadata comes from VITE_MATRIX_URL. The NestJS backend serves only metadata GraphQL (GET_SITES/GET_CHANNELS/GET_METRICS); no backend chart-data resolver exists. State persists in Redux + URL params; interval constrains the max date span.

name: Embedded Analytics
purpose: Stand-alone Plotly/Dash embed (PlotlyEmbeddedDash). Reads all chart params from URL query string (not Redux), looks up the site timezone via GET_SITE, and targets VITE_PLOTLY_URL with 'my-analytics' replaced by 'embedding'. Not company-gated (any authenticated user).
actions: Configure embedded chart via URL params

name: Energy Accounting
purpose: Site-level analytics tab reusing the AnalyticsPage component (router.tsx:212) and the same Plotly/Dash + legacy-Highcharts charting system, pre-configured for that site's energy charts.

name: Field Setup Intro
purpose: Welcome page for the 3-step field installation wizard. Explains the setup process and guides technicians to begin gateway commissioning.

name: Gateway Setup
purpose: First step of the wizard: select or validate a gateway device by serial number, confirming it exists in the system.

name: List Setup
purpose: Hub page after gateway validation: three navigation cards (Gateway Setup -> networking-info, Deno Setup -> deno-list, Verification Test -> verify-installation). Shows the resolved gateway name. Does not add or remove Denos.

name: Networking Info
purpose: Configure gateway network settings including IP address, DNS, and gateway parameters.

name: Deno List
purpose: Table of the Deno channels already linked to the gateway (via config.gateway). Inline-edit Deno name and aux pyranometer orientation/serial; jump to photo upload or live data. There is no discovery scan.
actions: Set aux pyranometer orientation and serial

name: Gateway Live Data
purpose: Real-time data verification from the gateway. Queries the channelRaw GraphQL endpoint to display the latest sensor readings (IRR, Tbom, RSSI, Vcap) from DENO devices, grouped by serial number, with timestamps formatted in the site's local timezone.
actions: Filter by channel or serial number via URL params

name: Setup
purpose: Full-screen modal to upload installation photos for a channel (gateway or Deno image sets), add notes, and create/update a Maintenance event. Photos go to S3 via POST /storage/denobox/upload; filenames are saved on channel.images.
actions: Create or update a Maintenance event

name: Verify Installation
purpose: Timed verification step that polls channelDataCount GraphQL query every minute to confirm DENO devices are actively sending data to the platform. Displays record count per serial number and links to a live data modal showing raw sensor readings for each channel.
actions: View record count per DENO serial number
Open Live Data modal for a channel

name: Tests
purpose: Performance and diagnostic reporting interface with two modes: View Archive for pre-generated reports or Create New for live test charts. Includes interactive Plotly dashboard with zoom controls, date navigation, and site/timezone-aware filtering.

name: Tests — View Archive
purpose: View pre-generated archived reports: Capacity Test, Energy Test, or Production and Loss. Each report is a static snapshot that can be zoomed and panned.

name: Tests — Create New
purpose: Generate live test charts on demand. Select site, chart type (Capacity, Energy, or Production/Loss), and date range. Date navigation buttons skip to previous/next period of the same duration.
actions: Pick date range or use presets

name: Events Feed
purpose: Paginated, filterable activity log of all events across accessible sites — including operator notes, alarms, maintenance records, tickets, data curation actions, and lessons learned. Supports infinite scroll, multi-filter sidebar, and inline event creation.
actions: Filter by site, category, severity, date range, status flags
View alarm group with child alarms

name: Event Detail
purpose: Full detail view for a single event, including metadata, site context, images/attachments, threaded comments with @mention support, alarm children, and chart context. Supports editing, commenting, and sharing.

name: Report Templates List
purpose: Lists all report templates accessible to the current user (super-admin sees all companies; others see own company only). Supports search by name, pagination, and company filter for super-admins. Each row links to the template detail/edit view.

name: Create Report Template
purpose: Wizard/form to create a new report template. Configures template name, type (FLEET), site selection (specific sites or all-sites), metric columns with aggregation methods, site property columns, custom columns with arithmetic expressions, group-by dimension, and optional scheduled email delivery (frequency, hour, recipients).

name: Edit Report Template
purpose: Edits an existing report template. All fields from creation are editable. Saving re-schedules the Agenda job if notification settings changed. Supports sending a test email with a 1-hour-expiring preview.

name: Report Template Detail
purpose: Read-only view of a report template showing full configuration: sites, metrics, custom columns, grouping, and notification settings. Super-admin can view any company's template; others limited to their own company.

name: System Status
purpose: SuperAdmin-only view of overall platform health. The backend systemStatus GraphQL query overlays the latest per-service health logs (statuslogs collection) onto the human-maintained SYSTEM_STATUS settings template and rolls them up to UP / DOWN / PARTIALLY_DEGRADED. Surfaced as the header status dot (currently commented out) linking to status.denowatts.com; also exposed via public REST /status-logs endpoints for an external status page.
